## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to verify this works. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Related issue linked (if any)
